title: Whimscape x Curios
description: Curios API support for Whimscape resourcepack
body:
A small addon for [Whimscape](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape) resourcepack adding Curios API support. Now the accessories menu is in sync with the rest of the Whimscape's interface. 

![Curios API menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a153440a9f3d9417638b60800f6ad93afc3d023f.png)
